Programs

Foreign Trade (English)

MENU

Globalization has been going on for about 30 years and increased the trade volume between countries tremendously and has the potential to increase it in the coming years. Nowadays, different pieces of the products consumed in various parts of the world is produced in different countries, and this makes it necessary for international trade to be managed and carried out in a much more professional manner. Our program, with its teaching staff consisting of highly qualified academicians as well as managers who have years of experience in the foreign trade sector, is one of the leading programs which provides training for its students in line with the recent developments in the world. Knowledge of a foreign language becomes vital for foreign trade graduates, considering that foreign trade transactions are carried out entirely in international markets and by international actors. Therefore, thanks to the quality and intensive foreign language education given by experienced English teachers, our graduates will start their business life one step ahead.

Our graduates can work in foreign trade departments of businesses, foreign exchange departments of banks, customs and transportation companies. If they are successful in the customs consultancy exams, they can receive the title of Assistant Customs Consultant by obtaining a B report card.
